name: Potstickers #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dumpling wrappers by cutting them into rounds.
2. Place all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well with your fingers. Chill before using.
3. Place 1-1/2 teaspoons of filling in the center of each wrapper, fold into half moon shape, and pinch edges together.
4. Freeze the dumplings at this point (you will have a lot). Put them on a cookie sheet and freeze until solid, then put them in freezer bags. Do not defrost before cooking; just cook them a little longer.
5. To cook:
1. Drop into boiling water and cook until they float to the surface.
2. Or, heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a frying pan. Brown the bottoms for about 2 minutes, add 1/2 cup chicken stock, cover, and cook until the chicken stock evaporates (about 5 minutes). Remove the lid and cook for a few more minutes to heat through.
6. Serve over rice.
